name: Uncooked Tomato Sauce with Olives & Mozzarell
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sauce ingredients in a noncorrosive bowl and let sit for at least 30 minutes or up to 2 hours.
2. Cook the pasta and drain it.
3. Return an empty pot to the turned off burner and pour in the drained pasta.
4. Cover with the lid for 1 minute to let the cheese soften.
5. Uncover and serve. This recipe is ideal for the height of tomato season on hot days.
